headline: Pfizer Declares Third-Quarter 2026 Dividend
summary: NEW YORK, June 24, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced that its board of directors declared a $0.43 third-quarter 2026 dividend on the company’s common stock, payable September 1, 2026, to holders of the Common Stock of record at the close of business on July 24, 2026.

headline: FDA Approves Pfizer’s IBRANCE Regimen for HR+, HER2+ Metastatic Breast Cancer Frontline Maintenance
summary: NEW YORK, June 24, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved IBRANCE® (palbociclib) in combination with trastuzumab, with or without pertuzumab, and endocrine therapy for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with hormone receptor-positive (HR+), human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-positive (HER2+) locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer (MBC) following induction treatment.
